title: Determine Color of a Chessboard Square
titleCn: 判断国际象棋棋盘中一个格子的颜色

testcases.input: coordinates = "a1" Output: false Explanation: From the chessboard above, the square with coordinates "a1" is black, so return false.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: From the chessboard above, the square with coordinates "a1" is black, so return false.

testcases.input: coordinates = "h3" Output: true Explanation: From the chessboard above, the square with coordinates "h3" is white, so return true.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: From the chessboard above, the square with coordinates "h3" is white, so return true.
